samples.xml_description:
Implement a 16-bit divider module, the dividend is 16-bit and the divider is 8-bit in combinational logic. Extract the higher bits of the dividend, matching the bit width of the divisor. Compare these bits with the divisor: if the dividend bits are greater, set the quotient to 1, otherwise set it to 0, and use the difference as the remainder. Concatenate the remainder with the highest remaining 1-bit of the dividend, and repeat the process until all dividend bits are processed. 16-bit dividend. 8-bit divisor. 16-bit quotient. 16-bit remainder. The parameter i represents the current bit position of the divisor. The parameter diff represents the difference between the dividend and the divisor.

Initialize the registers a_reg and b_reg with the values of A and B, respectively.

Use a for loop to iterate through the bits of the divisor.

For each bit, assign the value of the dividend to the register diff.

Compare the value of diff with the divisor.

If diff is greater than or equal to the divisor, subtract the divisor from diff and set the quotient bit to 1.

Otherwise, set the quotient bit to 0.

Update the dividend by shifting it left by one bit.

After the loop, assign the value of diff to the remainder.
